# Contributing

Thanks for contributing to this portfolio project! Please read this guide before opening an issue or pull request.

## Creating a Good Issue

- Use the issue template that best reflects the scenario.
- Give it a clear, specific title (e.g. "Add hobbies page" not "new page").
- Fill in the description, tasks checklist, and acceptance criteria.
- Check existing issues first to avoid duplicates.

## Creating a Good Pull Request

- Open one issue per task, and one PR per issue.
- Work on a dedicated branch off `main` (e.g. `feature/hobbies-page`).
- The PR template populates automatically — fill it in fully.
- Reference the issue it resolves with `closes #ISSUE_NO`.
- Add screenshots for any visual/UI changes.
- Keep PRs focused and small so they're easy to review.

## Useful Links

- [Project README](README.md) — setup and local run instructions
- [Jinja Documentation](https://jinja.palletsprojects.com/en/stable/api/#basics)
- [MLH Code of Conduct](https://mlh.io/code-of-conduct)
